aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AI recognition but lacks structured content and authority signals to ensure consistent citation by AI models.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common HVAC questions and answers.
Expand content to include HowTo guides for common HVAC issues.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is not actively managed.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and DIY troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content are being cited by AI models, while your site is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance your site's schema markup, create conversational content, and establish your authority in the HVAC space.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Noble Heating & Air
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI models.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your HVAC expertise AI-friendly and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Noble Heating & Air : Top-Rated Local HVAC Company in Portland
